_description: Varianz-Pool für Lifestyle-Creatives. Der Creative Producer wählt zufällig aus diesen Optionen um diverse Bilder zu generieren. Wird automatisch in Prompts injiziert.

models.description: Frau Mitte 40, dunkelblonde schulterlange Haare, natürlicher Look, schlank
models.prompt_snippet: A woman aged 44 with shoulder-length dark blonde hair, natural look, slim build, gentle smile

models.description: Frau Ende 40, kurze braune Haare, sportlich-elegant, etwas kräftiger
models.prompt_snippet: A woman aged 49 with short brown hair in a bob cut, elegant appearance, medium build, warm expression

models.description: Frau Anfang 50, graublonde Haare hochgesteckt, klassisch-elegant
models.prompt_snippet: A woman aged 51 with gray-blonde hair in a loose bun, classic elegant appearance, slender, serene expression

models.description: Frau Mitte 40, lange dunkelbraune lockige Haare, mediterran
models.prompt_snippet: A woman aged 45 with long dark brown curly hair, Mediterranean appearance, warm skin tone, radiant smile

models.description: Frau Ende 40, rotblonde wellige Haare, helle Haut, nordisch
models.prompt_snippet: A woman aged 48 with reddish-blonde wavy hair, fair Nordic skin, light freckles, calm content expression

models.description: Frau Anfang 50, silbergraue kurze Haare, modern-elegant
models.prompt_snippet: A woman aged 52 with short silver-gray hair, modern elegant style, fit build, confident relaxed expression

oberschenkel_vorne_sitzend.description: Auf Sofa/Sessel sitzend, Stab auf VORDERSEITE Oberschenkel, Blick nach unten aufs Produkt
oberschenkel_vorne_sitzend.prompt_snippet: sitting relaxed on {setting_furniture}, rolling the wooden stick on the FRONT of her UPPER THIGH (quadriceps, midway between hip and knee). Both hands grip the DARK walnut handles. Bare legs. She looks down at the product with a content half-smile.
oberschenkel_vorne_sitzend.body_parts_visible: bare upper thighs, hands on dark handles, looking down

oberschenkel_vorne_angelehnt.description: Zurückgelehnt auf Sofa, Beine etwas angewinkelt, Stab auf Oberschenkel, entspannter Blick
oberschenkel_vorne_angelehnt.prompt_snippet: leaning back on {setting_furniture}, legs slightly bent, rolling the wooden stick on her UPPER THIGH. Both hands on DARK handles. Bare legs. She leans back comfortably, eyes half-closed, very relaxed.
oberschenkel_vorne_angelehnt.body_parts_visible: bare thighs, relaxed leaning pose, hands on dark handles

oberschenkel_seitlich_gekreuzt.description: Sitzend mit übergeschlagenen Beinen, Stab auf dem oberen Oberschenkel
oberschenkel_seitlich_gekreuzt.prompt_snippet: sitting on {setting_furniture} with legs crossed (one knee over the other). Rolling the stick on the UPPER THIGH of the top leg. Both hands on DARK handles. Bare legs. Casual, comfortable cross-legged sitting position.
oberschenkel_seitlich_gekreuzt.body_parts_visible: bare crossed legs, thigh, hands on dark handles

wade_bein_ausgestreckt.description: Sitzend, ein Bein auf dem Sofa ausgestreckt, Stab auf der WADE
wade_bein_ausgestreckt.prompt_snippet: sitting on {setting_furniture} with one leg stretched out along the cushion. Rolling the stick on her bare CALF MUSCLE (back of lower leg, between ankle and knee). Both hands on DARK handles. Other foot on the floor. Relaxed pose.
wade_bein_ausgestreckt.body_parts_visible: bare calf stretched out, hands on dark handles

nacken_von_hinten_dutt.description: Von HINTEN gesehen, Stab im Nacken, Haare HOCHGESTECKT in Dutt
nacken_von_hinten_dutt.prompt_snippet: seen from BEHIND. Hair UP in a bun — NECK FULLY EXPOSED, no hair covering it. She holds the stick behind her bare neck — left hand on left DARK handle, right hand on right DARK handle. Arms raised behind head. Grooved middle on bare neck skin. Sleeveless top, bare shoulders.
nacken_von_hinten_dutt.body_parts_visible: bare neck, bare shoulders, hair in bun, arms raised

nacken_seitlich_dutt.description: Von der SEITE gesehen, Stab im Nacken, Kopf leicht geneigt, Haare hoch
nacken_seitlich_dutt.prompt_snippet: seen from the SIDE (profile view). Hair UP in a bun. She holds the stick behind her neck with both hands on DARK handles. Head tilted slightly forward in relaxation. The grooved middle section is against the back of her neck. Sleeveless top.
nacken_seitlich_dutt.body_parts_visible: side profile, bare neck, hair up, stick behind neck

oberschenkel_blick_kamera.description: Sitzend, Stab auf Oberschenkel, schaut direkt in die Kamera (Testimonial-Style)
oberschenkel_blick_kamera.prompt_snippet: sitting on {setting_furniture}, rolling the stick on her UPPER THIGH. Both hands on DARK handles. She looks DIRECTLY at the camera with a warm, genuine smile — like recommending the product to a friend. Bare legs.
oberschenkel_blick_kamera.body_parts_visible: bare thighs, eye contact, warm smile, hands on dark handles

oberschenkel_lachend_seite.description: Seitlich auf dem Sofa sitzend, Beine angezogen, Stab auf Oberschenkel, lacht
oberschenkel_lachend_seite.prompt_snippet: sitting sideways on {setting_furniture}, legs tucked up beside her. Rolling the stick on her UPPER THIGH. Both hands on DARK handles. She is laughing naturally, looking slightly away from camera. Bare legs. Casual, candid moment.
oberschenkel_lachend_seite.body_parts_visible: bare thighs, natural laugh, sideways sitting

wade_fuss_auf_tisch.description: Sitzend, ein Fuß auf dem Couchtisch/Hocker, Stab auf der Wade
wade_fuss_auf_tisch.prompt_snippet: sitting on {setting_furniture}, one bare foot propped up on a small stool or ottoman in front. Rolling the stick on her bare CALF MUSCLE of the raised leg. Both hands on DARK handles. Relaxed, with a cup of tea nearby.
wade_fuss_auf_tisch.body_parts_visible: bare calf raised, foot on stool, hands on dark handles

nacken_augen_geschlossen.description: Von der Seite, Stab hinter Nacken, Augen geschlossen, genießt den Moment
nacken_augen_geschlossen.prompt_snippet: seen from a THREE-QUARTER ANGLE (between side and behind). Hair UP in bun. Eyes CLOSED in bliss. She holds the stick behind her neck, both hands on DARK handles. Head tilted slightly back. Bare shoulders in sleeveless top. The expression is pure relaxation — like a spa moment at home.
nacken_augen_geschlossen.body_parts_visible: side-behind view, bare neck, eyes closed, blissful expression

oberschenkel_morgens_kaffee.description: Am Bettrand sitzend, Stab auf Oberschenkel, Kaffeetasse daneben, Morgen-Routine
oberschenkel_morgens_kaffee.prompt_snippet: sitting on the edge of {setting_furniture}, rolling the stick on her UPPER THIGH. Both hands on DARK handles. A warm cup of coffee/tea on the nightstand beside her. Morning light. She looks content, starting her day with a wellness routine. Bare legs in sleep shorts.
oberschenkel_morgens_kaffee.body_parts_visible: bare thighs, morning scene, coffee cup, relaxed morning face

wohnzimmer_sofa.prompt_snippet: bright modern living room with a beige linen sofa, green houseplants, warm afternoon light streaming through large windows. Scandinavian-style interior.

wohnzimmer_sessel.prompt_snippet: cozy living room corner with a comfortable armchair, soft throw blanket, reading lamp nearby, warm golden light. Hygge atmosphere.

garten_bank.prompt_snippet: sunny garden terrace with a wooden bench, lush green plants and flowers in soft focus behind. Dappled sunlight through trees. Summer afternoon.

garten_stuhl.prompt_snippet: modern patio with a sleek garden chair, potted herbs nearby, blue sky with soft clouds. Bright summer day.

schlafzimmer_bett.prompt_snippet: bright airy bedroom, sitting on the edge of a bed with white/cream linen bedding. Soft morning light through sheer curtains. Peaceful morning routine atmosphere.

balkon.prompt_snippet: sunny apartment balcony with a small bistro chair, potted plants on the railing, city or garden view in background. Morning coffee atmosphere.

outfits_summer: light linen shorts and a casual cream tank top, bare legs and arms
comfortable cotton shorts and a soft white t-shirt, bare legs
a light summer dress above the knee, bare arms and legs
casual denim shorts and a loose linen blouse, bare legs
thin light yoga pants and a simple sleeveless top, bare shoulders
light cotton lounge shorts and a fitted tank top, bare legs and arms
a thin flowy midi skirt and a sleeveless top, bare arms and calves
light leggings and a thin summer tank top, bare arms and shoulders
_outfit_rules: Dünne/leichte Kleidung ist OK (dünne Leggings, leichte Stoffe). KEINE dicken Pullover, Jacken, Winterkleidung, Jeans. Haut muss an der Anwendungsstelle SICHTBAR sein. Bei Bein-Posen: Shorts oder dünne Leggings. Bei Nacken-Posen: ärmelloses Top.
